I sent a message to my dad saying he must get 1 bitcoin this month, that it may be the best decision of his life, or else he may get poor as fuck in the next years. I will see him in person next week.

I also have an uncle who is quite wealthy, much more than my dad, whom I wanna get on board with BTC this month.

I´m currently reading "The Price of Tomorrow" from Jeff Booth, many say it is the best financial book of 2020, he argues how the economy is going to massively crash (he wrote in January, before Corona), cause we´re trapped in an economic system based on debt and inflation, while the new accelerating natural trend is towards deflation, so the debt will never be paid. Very, very good read. Jack recommended some of his podcasts early this year, I´m sure he suscribes his book´s thesis. Important shit. Also learning from other guys like Saylor, btc documentaries, Real Vision/raoul paul, etc. There is a small btc shop/place in my town, I need to go there and learn.

So... debt cannot be paid. To hide that truth central banks will keep printing money, hiding shot term the truth but debasing the currency like mad til it breaks. When is it gonna "break"? What is gonna happen??? I see hyperinflation and lost of purchasing power, but still don´t get the full picture... What will happen to things like real state, will they also devalue like mad?? Shit I need lo talk with people smarter than me asap. I see a massive problem but can´t appreciate the full picture/ramifications...

My ideal objective is, this January 2021:

1-- Learn how to buy and safely store the damm bitcoin. I am learning everyday about what is,etc. But I´m no a techie at all so it´s all weird. Need to get the details on the how to, safety, how to not lose or have stolen the code, etc...
2- Understand also the legallities of btc. Here in Spain I heard you have to declare if you have them, etc. Also I wanna know about the taxes too.
3- Get myself a 25.000€ loan and by my own bitcoin. Loan probably coming from my parents. I´m a freaking student still, but this year I could get a good income job if lucky. I have trust I can pay back that in 3 years or so. Potential gain is massive, losing all is recoverable with hard work. To much upside. If my family didn´t give me the loan my 2nd option would be to get it from a bank, which I still haven´t thought out...
4- Get my parents to get their own bitcoin and my uncle to get several of them. He is freaking rich, I just need to get him (and myself) to understand to a great degree the damm system. I also have some family members/friends I would tell them afterwards.

WISH ME LUCK!!!!. Freaking crazy times...

This 2021 objectives (some):
1- Learn about, get my bitcoin, and introduce the problem to family friends (asap, January)
2- All year: CT like mad, become a freaking Wim Hof in deep CT, follow Jacks autoinmune protocol cause I got some eczema/psoriasis in elbow
3- By summer: Get my public "secure" job. Then begin making some money with that or elsehow. The exam is hard, not sure if I´ll get it, but keep pushing it til I get it and/or get other jobs if I don´t. Make freaking money however I can, just not destroy mi health (not nights/huge emf)
4- Leave parents home. Become freaking independent.

Lately I´ve been wondering how getting into this crazy health journey changes our relationships so crazily. At least for me, it changes a ton how I feel and how I think, for good I´d say. I´m probably still stupid and emotionally fragile with all these human flaws but in comparison so much stronger... I see most people, whats seen "normal", as soo easily upsetable. So much in need of others approval, like social parasites. I mean, I see it in myself but the rational "me", my prefontal cortex or whatever needs to work in controlling that shit. We´re wired to look around and do what others do to fit in, even if its utterly stupid. Wearing blueblockers in the town I had that first impulse, still can feel it, like the impulse to take off the glasses for people not to look weird/laugh at me. So ridiculous lol

Lately I had big arguments with my mom and brother. They need constant approval, receive positive emotions, etc. But like.. crazy. Their emotions and thoughts are kinda all over the place. And I find so many people like them, and I´m convinced its mostly lifestyle driven. In "relationship" series I think Jack wrote it. Not "bad people" or "assholes" at all, for short interactions can be even good, but long term they demand too much attention, been super careful with what you say cause there stress hormones get all spiked up and they cannot relax, etc. "Energy vampires" as I´d define. Can be sad, but it is what it is. I try to avoid them as much I can. I tried to explain what I considered evident but ain´t easy...

Do you feel something like this??? In the last years, with having more/better energy... I feel my past relationships too superficial. Like I crave deeper connections that with past friends/family are difficult to get. I still maintain old frienships but we see less often.

Highschool and Uni friends are like... gaming, playing pokemon - or other shit game - online, drinking, some sports, not thinking/reading about deep shit going on in the world... I just feel different, something missing when I´m with them. Weird.

Funny enough I made friends lately with a couple men who knew Wim Hof method and approached me in the park when they saw me shirtless in winter, lol. They were into cold showers but not super all in, I´m trying to get them into CT, Jack´s stuff etc.

Also really enjoyed some "stop5g" actions I´m doing with a group in the region, so much fun. We did 3 or 4 actions this year post lock down, talking with tons of people and informing. I was impressed, many more people were aware to some point of the problem, and were interested.

Going right know into ice bath at 40F, lower than ever, my testicles will get inverted for a few hours but lets do it!!!

[@Pablo](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/21859/) - How's your workouts coming?
Going shirtless, is a normal thing for me no matter the time of year. Winter is better from a cold therapy point of view (even though air chill may only be in the 30rds F).
Back to the workouts... I typically get stopped by the opposite sex or at least the "I'm not looking at you, look" as they go by, but if you look back after you've passed each other, you catch them looking. The point. Attraction. We all want to know we are attractive to some of the opposite sex. It doesn't have to be all, just some will do. I use this to help motivate me to keep on keeping on - that is the daily workouts.

Before CoVid, I would walk the American River levee often - three times a day, because my work was right next to this parkway. During morning sunrise therapy, an elderly women walking her dog would always stop to talk with me. Once she told me that she told her concerned daughter that its safe to walk top of the levee, because there's a mostly naked man that she talks with each morning. I thought that was cute.

### Dan2 — 2021-02-07T14:11:51+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pablo%C2%B4s-optimal-journal.22116/post-295280>

JanSz knows a lot more about the details of this than I do, but maybe some of this simple version of info about pregnenolone and DHEA can be useful to you:

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/dan2s-journal.25288/page-4#post-295279](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/dan2s-journal.25288/page-4#post-295279)

(Some interesting (but maybe oversimplified? or misleading in your context? I don't know) points:
"...\[pregnenolone\] is one of our basic defenses against the harmful side effects that an imbalance of even our natural hormones can produce..."

"...\[pregnenolone\] improves the body's ability to produce its own pregnenolone..."

"Supplements of pregnenolone and thyroid seem to be the safest way to optimize DHEA production."

"...There was a study done back in the 1980s which showed that pregnenolone greatly amplified the effects of whatever steroid it happens to be co-administered with; so if you take some pregnenolone with DHEA you likely will be getting the effects of a much larger dose of DHEA without the potential of side effects.")

And related to Finasteride:

27:06 - about finasteride

Ray Peat: "I hear from a lot of people who've had trouble with that."

Danny Roddy: "What effects would you expect from inhibiting 5AR \[(what finasteride does)\]?"

Ray Peat: "Brain chemistry depends on the metabolism of progesterone as well as testosterone in your brain. If you block any of the enzymes used in making it, you're going to have weird brain." (!!!  )

Danny Roddy: "There's some famous quote from the FDA saying that dihydrotestosterone apparently has no function, or something, so that's the kind of thinking that was apparently going into making that drug, which is nice to know."

Ray Peat: "Yeah but it works on the progesterone system too. And yeah, they said progesterone is only a pregnancy-related chemical, neglecting that the brain absolutely depends on making it and absorbing some of it that's produced in the ovaries and adrenals and skin. It's a major brain hormone that you're messing with when you try to stop the production of DHT."

Danny Roddy: "So restoring the pregnenolone, DHEA, and thyroid function would probably be a good start to resolve somebody from taking that substance?"

Ray Peat: "Yeah, and even better probably to start with increasing your cholesterol production, which means keeping your intestine and liver in good condition."

### Pablo — 2021-04-10T23:01:53+0300

Sometimes I feel high as fuck, others stress is kind of overwhelming, some fear, uncertainty on the future, disgust and shitty feelings about shit in the world I´d like to change, etc. It´s never perfect but I feel I´m living on my edge. Ain´t that the important? I really feel I´m pushing it in upward direction. It´s not lineally upwards, feels kinda volatile upwards, like bitcoin, lol.

Just did 45´at 8C CT, quite decent for me. Yesterday it was late night so I did just 25´but even short exposures are awesome. I´m not a beast but I can tolerate cold water in the 40´s F with some dignity. I got some MB and nicotine and it does give and edge with energy, mood, mental

I´m focusing on mobility( massage, band traction, compression, etc.), with exercise from K. Starrett´s "Becoming a supple leopard" and other mobility guys. I´ve been pretty damm stiff for years, and I gotta make it a priority. CT, sun, LLLT, etc all seem to help but I really feel I need to get there with some lacrosse balls and other hard guns and suffer like a bitch. Especially the upper body has been pretty screwed. Also some yoga I´m trying.

Enough screen time. I´m gonna suffer a bit with the damm balls before bed lol. Keep pushing it guys!!! And think long term!!

Dr. Kelly Starrett is awesome. I've been to a couple of his group training courses about 15 years ago.

As you know, emotional stability has a physical and "emotional" component.

-   Physically, we work to up our redox (energetic) potential using
    -   Sunlight - morning noon & dusk
    -   Strength Exercise - barefoot on the moist earth
    -   Nutrition - High DHA protein and vegetables
    -   Recovery - Sleeping in complete darkness
-   Emotionally, we work to up our attitude

    -   Always giving yourself a smile as you believe the best coming your way
    -   Always giving yourself and others forgiveness for things that just need to be let go
    -   Practice Gratitude

    Make the habit of feeling good <- change it up <- do it again

lol we need to make it a thing again.

Actually I did it in a beach which has difficult access, especially when the tide is high, when you can only go through a goat path quite steep, not easy. I´m gonna make it my naked refuge this spring.

Most of humans we get quite uncomfortable with other naked people around and also when we are naked. I wonder exactly why, I´m not 100% sure. I believe part is cause of visually seeing the body and genitals of people you are attracted makes you horny so society, through its clothing rules, just makes it easier for our sexual instincts not to go crazy, to become more controlled, so monogamy is easier achieved, with less fighting caused by infidelities, etc.

Now, is that really the reason or one of the primary ones for our clothing social rules, constraining sexual desire? If so, what about people in tribes that live naked, do they have more social problems with cheating, etc.? Wouldn´t we just eventually get used to seeing people naked after some time being the rule, the same we´re getting used right now to seeing people with masks, after a transitioning period?

Was it just to protect us from the cold and the elements, and then in turned into a social rule? Other reasons?

I´m not sure, but this social rule clearly is anti biology, now we got enough evidence. Should we push against it? Should we make a culture that makes more sense biologically? I think we should ponder these things.

### John Schumacher — 2021-04-11T16:38:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pablo%C2%B4s-optimal-journal.22116/post-297105>

I love the naked human form.

Yes - it is sexual.

I don't feel embarrassed about being naked; but I understand most people do. There are times I may feel some sense of embarrassment - like when I'm not as "ripped" as I want and I don't have the shape I've been working out for. So when my body is tight, I feel much better about exposure.

Being male, I'm very attracted to the female human form. Being attractive to females has also been a motivating factor, especially when I'm not feeling like a workout. This workout video has helped me get off my ass when I need a bit of motivation -

With all that said, I believe clothes are a good thing. They help the human psyche force on the person rather than her form. As the old saying goes - "Eyes up here". Clothing can help pull our attention from her body to her eyes and ultimately her mind and heart. So we can connect not just with biological desires, but with compassion.

So when my body is tight, I feel much better about exposure.

Clothing can help pull our attention from her body to her eyes and ultimately her mind and heart. So we can connect not just with biological desires, but with compassion.

Haha you´re big into the fitness stuff. I was crazy troughout my life into fitness and sports, but my health broke regardless. I believe it´s good in proper dose, environment, and doing the other stuff right. I have history of overtraining, part because of ego and having good body comp (some insecurity) and part cause I just loved it, the challenge, the endorphins, the competition...

I think it is more sublte than being naked is just seeing bad cause of sexual. I need to think more about it, but I have heard people saying, and I do believe it, that some types of clothing are actually more sexual than being naked. Think about it, when you´re naked, there is no mistery, it´s all there. Part of the sexual tension is the excitement about seeing more of the other person´s body, personality, etc. Like an onion you like to peel. People use clothing in a way, shape, color, etc to draw attention to some parts, and less to others, etc.

At the end of the day, I see it like this: society is screwing up with our modern habits, so if you want health, joy, happiness, energy long term, you gotta do stuff different. I´ve had some mental barriers about wearing blueblockers in public, being shirtless in the park in winter, being without shoes, etc. 2 things about it.

1- As redox and hormones get better you begin to give less of a fuck about it. You don´t scan people so much looking for approval
2- Even then, some insecurities and scanning the environment is still there, as social animals we scan (at least I do) constantly what other people do and imitate, and feel weird when doing very different stuff (clothing, masks, behaviour...).

So I just do what I know is good long term, regardless, and observe myself feeling weird about it. I train my focus, it actually gets so fun. Just on the edge of what is socially acceptable (e.g. people looking weird at you but not calling the police neither saying anything, etc.). I´m shirtless in the park of the town, not in the streets, though biologically we should push for the latter I think. Actually more people have come to ask me, all in a very good way, interested, when they see me shirtiess in the sunrise session in park. I talk about cold, Wim Hof, and if they stay more interested, about light and Jack.

Motivation... couple songs I discovered and got me crazy pumped up, like a crazy monkey:

"The hard walks lead to the greatest destinations... the toughest climbs lead to the best views!!!!!"

"And one day you´ll give thanks for those sleepless nights,
and the times when you were crying couldn´t get things right,
´cause the lessons pain was teaching you about this life,
where like an arrow, pulled you back,
then send you forward in flight.....
there´s no growth in the confort zone!!!"

Is it just that light/energy/time (I don´t even know if that is the same and the physics Jack talks...lol) are just limited in me/us, and I just wanna use it freaking constructively, not dissipate it in purposeless shit? Am I an egoist by doing that? Am I just a sane human being by trying to conserve energy in me and build more complexity and richness in my life experience? ...

### Pablo — 2021-07-07T16:46:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pablo%C2%B4s-optimal-journal.22116/post-300765>

Libido keeps going up. Mood too, chemistry gets better.

**Many hours of low UV light in my balls/ full body**, not even kiniki if I can. If rainy: EMR TEK to my balls. I get erections and quite horny while in the Sun, still haven´t surprised anyone in my village lol. I will report any funny stuff. Mood, libido, and erections fluctuate a ton with Sun and CT (when I´m super consistent, I feel normal happy horny guy, if missing even a little I´m not)

**Lots of beach time, with ocean time. Beginig deep diving**, I just go down a few meters (5-6 max) and swim a little if I can. I suck at it but it´s fun. I know a couple guys who are the best in the region in spearfishing, I wanna do that stuff in the future, so cool.

When in city: **CT batchtub, I can do 45´10ºC or below quite easy** if well rested. If lacking sleep I strougle a bit, but anything counts. **Next winter I´ll be CT rockstar damm it. Wim Hof I´ll beat your records!**

Mmmm what else... In my whole health journey I´ve been oscillating between been overwhelmed by the fears, self-pity and that stuff and the optimism of how quantum health is getting me (slowly) to higher and higher levels.

Ahh and the **mobility stuff. Jesus I have so many muscle nots, imbalances and issues. But I can already swim, run, do some calisthenics, padel**, etc. Lots of self massage/ attacking my tissues with all sort of balls rollers, etc. So eager to increase my exercise, jesus I love it, I live for it, my whole live I´ve loved pushing my body limits through sports, competition, learning skills with my body etc. I´ve missed it. It´s coming back.

Soon, **in a few months, I´ll have my public job exams**. If I get it - not that easy...- I´ll have my money issues covered (here in Spain public jobs are for live and with good conditions). **Half of my income would go to BTC probably**. I´ll consider other ways to get more money, but right now focusing just on that job and maaany hours on health. One step at a time

### Pablo — 2021-07-07T16:51:53+0300

### Pablo — 2021-10-16T15:39:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pablo%C2%B4s-optimal-journal.22116/post-304928>

1-Just bought a new meter, the ESI 24, recommended by Brian Hoyer, expert in this stuff. This is a "tri-meter", obviously just to get a rough idea (240€), but.... holy crap.

This morning I had a walk through my hometown mid size city and was freaking shocked with the magnetic fields level. Top of the meter in half the city. I knew already the RF levels cause I own an Accousticom 2, but this is a whole fucking world.

Right now I have the ESI-24 trimeter, the Acousticom 2 for RF (which can die anytime) , and a multimiter with a cable to insert in the garden, in my village where I live in a house.

**Can I measure dirty electricity with either the trimeter or the multimeter, or can it give me at least a cue about levels, or do I need specificly a dirty electricity meter, such as stezter?** I´m still uneducated enough for this stuff, but I feel the home electricity is a huge deal, maybe more than RF.

I **highly encourage everybody to measure all kinds of fields, not just RF**. Actually I´m freaking out cause as I write this I´ve discover that there is a huge electric field by my computer. I mean, I actually tried before to get the screen as far as I could, but I´m finding that the electric fields get decent only if I put both the keyboard and the mouse as far as I can from my body. I mean they are corded ones, holy fuck, i didn´t expect that one. Are there shielded corded items I should buy? Jesus Christ.

2- Saunas are closed cause covid. **What do you think about heat lamps??** I´m reading some crazy healing stories in amazon, tempted to get one. Only thing is nnEMF bullshit they may emit. But I actually miss the heat from sauna, loved it and it´s been 2 years since I don´t get it. Found this one, and others decently cheap (100€ or less)
[https://www.amazon.es/Beurer-11-inf...s=lampara+de+calor&qid=1634383535&sr=8-7&th=1](https://www.amazon.es/Beurer-11-infrarrojos-compacta-inclinacion/dp/B001Q3S39K/ref=sr_1_7?__mk_es_ES=%C3%85M%C3%85%C5%BD%C3%95%C3%91&dchild=1&keywords=lampara%2Bde%2Bcalor&qid=1634383535&sr=8-7&th=1)

3- I tried acupuncture, 4 sessions already. Not magic pill but feels good. I read people warning about puting metal in high EMF areas etc., I don´t know. I feel some energy moving, tingly subtle and pleasurable sensation, and some microespasms towards the second end of the hour.

I´m trying to improve the health of my fascia/collagen, which I feel it´s been huge issue for long time. When I competed in tennis I had many muscle issues, and I still have much work to do. I´m combining acupuncture with dry needling and massage by a PT friend, and also doing self massage and yoga/stretching, using all sort of bands and weird shit. I´m learning some interesting stuff. Deep tissue massage stimulates local hydration of tissues mainly (somethinh about hialuronic acid binding to water, I get lost there), while stretching and more superficial massage estimulate fibroblasts (some cell organelle I think) and collagen synthesis.

Wierd shit. But bottom line is I need to do both massage that hurts over trigger points, focusing mainly on insertion between muscled, where there tends to be more adhesions, but also stretching and pushing the body to all sorts of positions.

4- Winter is coming. CT is out friend, lets see how far can I take it this winter. Already went to the river and you can feel that shit. So funny when people see me there or in the park shirtless, they think I have some mental issues lol, i think the same about them, it´s not even really cold here and people wear a gazillion clothes. We ´re becoming a shit domesticated species, GET WILD GUYS

I´ll keep posting stuff, and some photos if I can. Take care guys and reduce that mfking EMF´s )) the bad not the good ones. Weird times we´re at but I try to feel grateful everyday about having found out Jack´s work. It changes everything, our whole life courses. Let´s play it

### Pablo — 2022-09-11T22:05:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pablo%C2%B4s-optimal-journal.22116/post-315577>

Some quick updates.

I will not talk today much about my dad´s pancreatic cancer, only can say he´s finishing his chemo, 2 weeks left and then they´ll see if he achieved operability, they initially gave a 30% chance of that happening. We´ll see. But he fucked up, IMO, with his choices, god knows I tried to convince him to change course, gave him books, resouces, blueblockers... But his brain didn´t get it, he continued with EMF and blue light, lots of "healthy fruits", genetic vaccine experiments, etc. It is easy to get sad when you love someone and see him dying while they´re living, not realizing their bad choices, but it is also stupid to waste energy and time when you are not been listened.

Changing topics, other remarkable thing for me is I got a good damm job. Well it is great for most people, in terms of job security and good income. The thing is I will have to deal with indoor office and some substantial nnEMF. So obviously I´m not thinking to stay here 40 years like all my partners, but my plan is to be here 2-5 years here, but who knows, until I can get income while living more like a wild and not a zoo animal.

So on the **good side** of the job I can say:

1- Good salary, I´ll be able to get some BTC, lots of oysters, DDW, great food, EMR TEK lights, magnetico and some of this biohacking stuff eventually. Also some vacations to chase Sun in the winter.

2'- Some flexibility. I need to be there at least 9-14, but the rest of hours is flexible, so I can see some sunrise every day. Also I believe it is possible to work remote 1 or 2 days a week, which I´ll explore and do in a couple months probably.

3- I´m kinda the boss, not in the whole council, but of a small part I´m working in. So I´ll be having tons of outdoor breaks, and won´t have any boss micromanaging me.

On the **challenges:**

1- The windows in the building I work do not open!! But there is nice rooftop and I ´ll go out a shit ton

2- We have corded phones, which is suposedly good, but I meassure and the emited a lot of magnetic fiels. Solution: Speakerphone, since tomorrow I´ll have an office or room only for myseld. The same, speaker phone, I´ll do with my personal mobile phone there. Also I need to get some good air tube headset to talk in the mobile phone when I need some privacy. So need to work on that, not easy since most of them stupidly have magnets or metal parts around the earbuds, so lets see what i figure out.

3- Not in the job, but I need to buy a car soon, and it is not easy right now, since there are less available, and most new ones have electronic shit that make them EMF hell holes. I´m investigating too these days to get the lowest nnEMF car I can get!!

You see, I´m feeling quite optimist despite my dad having a bad cancer, a crazy economic crisis right here, people beeing exponentially fucked by nnEMF, experimental vaccines, etc and myself still not totally recovered my sexual machinery where I want it to be. It is weird, but I´m feeling pretty good most days recently. It seems optimizing neurotransmitters is the freaking key.

Ahh, the rest of this yeart I´ll be super tight on time. Learning to write complex public contracts for my job, going weekends to see my dad, etc. **But next year I want to meet black swans out there!!**

**I reflect a lot on friends and socializing been amazing for health. BUT, THAT IS FOR THE RIGHT SOCIAL INTERACTIONS AND PEOPLE,** i see so many people, in my family, old friends, and just random people out there easily stealing your energy, if you are not alert. I see it as an art to preserve your energy with these people (the majority of the population, probably). It is subtle stuff, it is not about not socializing, being totally autistic with certain people and only talk and open with "the selected few" that have great energy. It is about opening and sharing your energy at many different levels with different people and different situations, a totally dynamic thing. I tend to open generally, but I kind of withdraw the energy from an interaction when I see I´m losing too much energy. You may think I´m all woo woo nuts lol, but this is something I perceive super clearly right now, and I didn´t in the past. I like perceiving more things.

It´s cool this journaling thing. It´s like therapy or something. Whenever I get some weird emotions in myself it feels good to put them here. It´s strange

### Pablo — 2022-10-10T22:03:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pablo%C2%B4s-optimal-journal.22116/post-316462>

Good thing of turbulent times is that they show us who to pay attention to and who to ignore. They allow us to focus better our time and attention

I´m trying to buy a car. New ones are horrible with electronics etc. Today I tested an old gasoline one but magnetic field was still high (less than new cars, but too high for my taste). I think diesel old cars are the the way to go. Lets see if this week I get one. The diesel Toyota Corolla of my parents is amazing low emf but they need it.

This week I begin DDW, I plan to do 4-6 months minimum. I think if I remain smart I can offset emf damage from my job, and even thrive, but it takes to walk the narrow road. I´m enjoying it so far.

Got my first salary from my new job, very good money compared to most of my friends/age group. However I won´t be able to get too much BTC this months without borrowing (DDW, great food, oysters, red light, car, and all this stuff is quite costly). I don´t know if I should get a loan for BTC, as it is that cheap compared to prior months, or just euro coast average a little bit these months and more when I have less expenses.

I have good community with calisthenics guys in the afternoon, outdoors, exercising and with music, it´s fun stuff.

At work I take regular breaks at the rooftop and I have corded phone and with hands-fee option too so it´s better than expected. I have a room all for myself so its good. I still find amazing how people don´t feel the dumbing down from blue light and the need to get outside. I was like that, but now it is instictual for me. I feel this strain in the laterals of my head if I don´t.

### Pablo — 2023-03-27T22:54:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pablo%C2%B4s-optimal-journal.22116/post-320276>

Update:
\-Dad died 7th of march, 20 days ago. It´s weird but I´m emotionally ok. I cried like a baby the day I knew he was dying and got sedated by docs, but I think I haven´t´really cried since then. There is a weird mix of joyfullness with peacefulness and sadness.

Things I´m focusing right now:
**\-I want to get a 20G magnetico sleep pad, does anyone know how can I get it to Spain?** I read somewhere that the guys don´t ship to Europe, and they didn´t answer my email. I think this could really help mitigate the office environment.
\-Learning and getting btc
\-Work: I have to learn so much, administrative law is so extensive and huge... but I want to read as much as I can in the Sun in the park and minimize time in the office, lots of sunbreaks etc. I think especially with the magnetico I could mitigate decently and keep improving redox. Also the sun is getting better here at 43 lat, and I´m doing lots of DDW, going again with CT (I stopped with ice baths when dad was getting worse, only cold showers and some beach swims, but I want and need again good CT), also love the community in the park doing calisthenics, running, basket, acrobatics... it ´s so fun.

Anyways, I keep doing the stuff and trying my best, with pitfalls of course. I think I may be able to make possible living at 43 lat with office job, sounds crazy to say in this forum butI get good money, at least for Spanish young guy = can afford good food, travelling in winter to strong Sun, body work, PBM... Also work is 7 hours a day (6 in summer) but I get little contol in how many sunbreaks I do, and also I get quite a lot of vacations =more outdoors/time for healing activities. One drawback is I´m near local politicians, which could be even worse than 5G...

The city is 220.000 inhabitants so it could be improved but is not emf hell I think, at least there are still some low emf places (at moment living in my parents apartment cause no ones is using it, my room is low emf as far I can meassure. I could afford living at a house outside or other place, so I may change home in future. Weekends I go to the village house with mom, very low pop and beautiful nature. My plan is working here in council a few years, and then eventually leave, start a company that I can manage, either on the internet or in Spain but that I can manage from remote, but who knows.

My libido/erection issues, I have not monitored too much. Been under huge stress from my dad illness and dying and also with work, so as stress lowers and I get "on track" and keep improving things I ´ll try and engage with some women to see how the machinery responds.

I´ll keep posting, but I´m having hectic time these days. Take care

Just arrived the 10G magnetico. I slept friday night on it and I noticed a subtle good feeling. Lets see how it feels this week. I´ll probably soon upgrade to 20G (I don´t know why it didn´t allow me to ship the "super sleep system" to Spain, maybe cause of too much weight, the stuff is heavy...)

I´m earning decent money but I have spent most. Second hand car, magnetico, DDW, red light, blueblocker, emf meters, dirty electricity filters, a bit of btc... Still I think investing in one´s health and education is the best, but money is limited.

Jack says (in the april Q and A) I need to move to the tropics and get a minimum of 36 months of continuous UV stimulous to have a chance to recover. Then he suggested the possibility to get a customed UV-IR bed for winter, which I´m thinking about. It is clear I need to get much more UV than I can get in the 43 latitude, the question is if permanently moving is the only solution. I just got a great job (well some nnemf and blue light of course, but with some time flexibility decent earning etc is about the best I could figure out right now), so I have to get a plan for next winter, I am thinking:
\- Get a UV-IR tanning bed made from someone that knows how to do it or... would it be ok to just mix myself the UVA blacklights I have with the EMR TEK red/ir and some sperti for UV-B?
\- Schedule about 3 vacations of 10-12 days during winter to high UV locations. I´m thinking something like Canaries in november, Ecuatorial Guinea in december or january and Mexico in january or february. That could change depending on different variables, but I have a feeling it could be decent. I have a good friend from Ecuatorial Guinea and he may go there next winter, could shoe me the country etc. I think it´s cheap and huge UV. Also Canaries should have great magnetism cause of its volcanic origin? And of course I wanna feel those cenotes in Mexico Jack talks so much about.
\-There is no UV in my latitude from about 5 november to 5 february.Aside from the above traveling, using some articial UV and crazy cold, probably it is good idea to go high to the mountains, to get some more UV and cold stimoulous.

I have a sense I could recover being smart during winters, but I need to be like a damm diligent mitocondrial ninja. If after this winter I don´t feel I have improved a lot, I´ll have to move.

Still I think I can improve so much my environment here in the 43 latitude. Last months with my dad pancreatic cancer and dying have been quite stressful = worse health and recovery, living with all of them in the same appartment. I wanna spend my free time in great environments and people with great vibes, that´s healing.

### Pablo — 2023-09-05T23:38:52+0300

Short update:

I got the 20G magnetico, a lot of DDW (25 and 18 PPM, I drink quite liberally, a lot, and often directly from the bottles, I don´t know if it is better to mix it with regular water...), I am doing 3-4 CT a week (not super crazy temperatures or lenght, but I´ll do more in winter. I tend to add a ton of epsom salts and it seems I feel a bit better with that), bought and use yellow blueblockers during daytime job, and keep listening podcasts, webinars and q and a´s from Jack (I haven´t read the blogs for a while I´ll admit...I´m all day reading for work and I get tired of reading...).

The job I´m at has a lot of responsabilities, even though I only have one year of experience, but I´m controlling and using public money, trying to make sure polititians use it legally, etc. Even with very substantial stress, pressure and time in the office for the job, I feel I continue improving health, even if slowly. Lets see what happens next months, especially during winter, but I am able to have regular sex (couple days a week) with this girl from the canaries I´m meeting. Still have way to go, got better erections but sensibility needs to improve since it takes me forever to orgasm! I don´t reach it with intercourse, she gets pains before that, but at least we are both enjoying it, and things seem to improve.

Objectives for next months/year(s):

\-Surviving my job, both health wise and not going to jail. Need to learn a lot, do things much quicker, etc.
\- Learn more about BTC. Damm this thing is complex, and I have little free time now... I do have some in cold storage and some in an exchange, but too little still. I wanna learn about decentralized exchanges without KYC and the best cold storage solutions (cold storage with companies with open source and maybe learning about multiseg, etc. I read a couple books and listened a lot of podcasts on BTC but still feel I don´t know shit!
\- CT like mad, I love the sensation afterwards. Make the time and effort to put this as a priority, even when life gets hectic...
\- Doing a 23andme to know my haplotype. I was reluctant cause I saw companies sell our data, but I heard Jack saying a possibility was to just change names with a friend. I got a friend to agree doing it
\- Keep meeting people into this quantum health thing and talking and teaching it to people, but only to the people who are receptive/want to listen. It is the biggest discovery of my life, lifechanging stuff, most people here have experienced the frustration of family and people not caring a shit about this...only option is let them sink and learn if the can from it. Actually I got a couple friends from calisthenics that got quite into this stuff, with groundin, sun, ct, diet... nnemf and bluelight is a little more difficult for them to limit them consistently but they at least understand its importance...

Just some ramdom stuff, take care

Hey guys,

This weekend I got the chroma D-light, for vitamin D production during winter: [https://getchroma.co/products/d-light-vitamin-d-light-device-uvb-red-nir](https://getchroma.co/products/d-light-vitamin-d-light-device-uvb-red-nir)

I tried it yesterday, I did more time than recommended (a few minutes, rather than the 15-90 seconds they say) but at a bigger distance since there was a bit of EMF at 12". I was not feeling anything at the moment so I thought everything was ok (I dind´t meassure time and distance exactly, it could have been 3 minutes, but maybe 1 meter or so),

After 1 hour or so I noticed I had decent sunburn, and next morning (monday morning here in Europe right now), I feel quite itchy.

I wanted to ask a couple things.

First, how to alleviate skin UV excessive damage? I believe red light/IR is healing even afterwards, not only preconditioning. Also I´m going to put some aloe vera, coconut oil etc. I wonder if the exoesqueleton of crustaceans (shrimps) is also healing afterwards I got UV damage/burn. Another thing I believe probably is good for sunburns is CT. I´m all ears to any suggestion! At the moment the most painful is my ass, is a bit uncomfortable but tolerable, and also the trunk.

Second, I read an email from the manufacturer saying they have meassure and some of the units produced emit a small amount of UV-C light, and that could be a risk. He offers several options, one of them being to give us another kind of light, more expensive, red/IR/cyan/violet/deep violet. What are your opinions of this light? I´m tempted to ask for this light, since another D-light with UVB won´t be shipped until april, when I´ll alredy have natural UV-B from the Sun. This model of light "lux vital" they offer is called "opsin activator".

The wavelenghts they offer are:

-   1050nm NIR 5 watt
-   935nm NIR 5 watt
-   850nm NIR 10 watt
-   760nm NIR 10 watt
-   670nm Deep Red 10 watt
-   630nm Red 10 watt
-   485nm Cyan 50 watt (OPN4 Stimulation)
-   405nm Violet 50 watt (OPN3 & OPN5 Stimulation)
-   385nm Deep Violet 50 watt (OPN3 Stimulation)

I guess it is a light to use in the morning since it has blue light...

I haven´t seen any reviews on this device... Apreciate any comment!!

### Pablo — 2024-01-30T23:31:18+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pablo%C2%B4s-optimal-journal.22116/post-330769>

I just ordered several kinds of lights from Chroma, lets see how they go.

Regarding cookware, how about stainless steel? I have a frying pan of this material and another of iron. The stainless steel is so much easier to use (less heavy, easier to clean, does not get oxidized...), however I learned that most stainless steel pans, like mine, come with aluminum in the middle. I wonder if/how much of a problem this is. I know aluminum is very bad, but here they say only the core is aluminum, and it is surrounded by the stainless steel so suposedly aluminum does not get into the food... Do you believe it?

[https://www.amazon.es/dp/B00F2GYN96?psc=1&ref=ppx\_yo2ov\_dt\_b\_product\_details](https://www.amazon.es/dp/B00F2GYN96?psc=1&ref=ppx_yo2ov_dt_b_product_details) This is the pan I´m using, I wanted to buy another for my mom but I´d like to investigate this aluminum stuff better... ### coho3131 — 2024-01-31T17:54:57+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pablo%C2%B4s-optimal-journal.22116/post-330780>

I do not think the aluminum gets past the stainless steel cooking surface.

Stainless steel will leach chromium and nickel, and this will be even more so with acidic foods or liquids.

I do not wash our cast iron pans with soap or water. I just wipe them out with a cloth, or rub them with fat and salt. If I want to sanitize them for some reason, I put them in a hot oven for a while.

### Pablo — 2024-02-19T06:47:08+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pablo%C2%B4s-optimal-journal.22116/post-331627>

Yesterday I left my girlfriend.

I had been about 11 months with her. There were different reasons why I did, but I believe the main one was she did not have that "energy/vibe/redox", and I did not she her doing enough to regain it.

Too much instagram, phone use, etc.

It is weird cause the last months it was me who was much hornier and wanting to have sex, and she was little interested, we had not much sex, sometimes it was painful for her, etc.

At the time I thought she was not interested in me in particular, but now I´m pretty sure it was not me, she was very engaged with me but her sexual machine was/is not working properly cause of her tech choices, lifestyle...

She was born and lived most of her life in the Canary Islands, all the outside, enjoyed sunbathing, etc. Then she moved North (40-43 lat) for work about 5 years ago and after 1 year she developed endometriosis, with pain in her ovaries, so doc prescribed her the contraceptive ring. She also developed a bit of melasma.

With the ring, her pain went away.

I search what dr Kruse had writen about this and sent a few articles to her. I tried she was strict with blocking blue light, not being 2-3 hours in the stupid instagram (or do it wired and in safer way), lower carbs, etc... She didn´t see the sunrise most days either. So I felt I had to leave her, I felt in different vibes/redox states. My main driver is health, she didn´t have that burning desire to do this stuff. She liked to enjoy life, have some drinks, etc... I felt some disconnect there. I also love sport, she doesn´t, etc.

### [SEX, TECHNOLOGY, and DEUTERIUM](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/sex-technology-deuterium-jack-kruse)

What happens over a few generations with no sex? EXTINCTION. What causes celibacy syndrome in Asians who make made love to the 5 G devices on Wifi with no blue blockers on? Myopia, low dopamine, and sexless as deuterium fills their mitochondrial matrices in all their various tissues in their body.

 www.linkedin.com

I was rereading this article, so damm true...

One of the things she did good and I was happy with her was she loved sunbathing, we went many times to the beach, naked, etc. But now in winter she says it is too cold for her so she does not take it. I´ve noticed these months a huge drop in her sexual desire, she has more vaginal pain during sex, etc. Less Sun + ALAN + too much phone usage + too much carbs = Almost no sex desire, painful sex.

It is a pity. I didn´t let her just cause we were having little sex or she momentarily had low energy and dopamine... if I saw different habits or serious intention to change habits probably wouldn´t have.

# Thread: Why have I chosen the path I have now in medicine?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-have-i-chosen-the-path-i-have-now-in-medicine.22117/>
**Subforum:** Educating Doctors
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2018-09-20T15:36:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-have-i-chosen-the-path-i-have-now-in-medicine.22117/post-251383>

I believe a purpose is something for which one is responsible for cultivating and bringing forward to the rest of the world to see. Why do you do what you do? I believe we’re the creators of our own experience – comprehending this every day and remembering this in every experience we have while living our lives from this perspective empowers us to do great things that others think is impossible. Do people make fun of you and call you crazy when you think that what you're building might change the world in some way? My advice is not to worry about what any 'obedient idiot' thinks about you or your work on social media. Do what you are passionate about doing. When people get in your way eliminate the unnecessary. Removing them will improve the rapidity of change you seek in the world. What you are doing might not make sense to the rest of the world until they see the wisdom in why you are doing it. If you like this idea......join my tribe at jackkruse.com. Black Swans who have a very distinct why they do and live as they do, become able to bear almost any how the world throws at them. This is the way of the mitochondriac. The failures I have learned about my profession since I left training have taught me the greatest lesson of my life to date. You can’t just sit there and wait for people to give you that golden dream or promise you thought you were getting in life or your job. The reality is you must put your best ideas to work with actions that can really make a difference to the people who you are trying to help in ways they might not understand on the surface. You do this by putting yourself out there and make it happen for yourself and them.

### caroline — 2018-09-21T04:36:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-have-i-chosen-the-path-i-have-now-in-medicine.22117/post-251450>

the beauty of a life well lived......

### Jack Kruse — 2022-10-07T18:43:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-have-i-chosen-the-path-i-have-now-in-medicine.22117/post-316359>

Future centralized doctors are ill prepared for a world of patients bathing in nnEMF that changes how organic chemistry operates in cells. Hire decentralized docs who aced organic chemistry and every other type of chemistry associated with the biophysics of life. I wonder if med school admissions departments will get the names of the premed students who signed this petition? It seems like an important piece of info when considering their fitness for medicine, no?[https://www.nytimes.com/2022/10/03/us/nyu-organic-chemistry-petition.html](https://www.nytimes.com/2022/10/03/us/nyu-organic-chemistry-petition.html)

# Thread: Why redox before detox?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-redox-before-detox.22118/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 12
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Elizabeth G — 2018-09-20T16:30:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-redox-before-detox.22118/post-251386>

This is the question that has been on my mind since I heard Dr. Jack say it in a podcast. If I think of my body like a house that needs renovating, I would go in and get rid of the junk that was in the house, removing left behind furniture dirt, a old drywall, old electric and phone lines, etc. Once that stuff was removed, I could go in and rewire the electricity.

Redox before detox feels like rewiring the house first. Anyone who's done a renovation knows that it can be done, but why would you do it that way? It seems much harder.

Before I heard that quote, I had already done a fair amount of detox, and redox is certainly the missing link. Working on that now.

### Mike David — 2018-09-20T18:48:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-redox-before-detox.22118/post-251392>

A higher redox is like the concrete foundation. Detox is like all the wood and eye dressing that goes on top. If your foundation has cracks in it your detox efforts will just turn into a pile of firewood. Then inflammation provides the match and your modern world gives a nice spark.

# Thread: Floxin damage is a topologic issue folks.
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/floxin-damage-is-a-topologic-issue-folks.22122/>
**Subforum:** Educating Doctors
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2018-09-22T14:03:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/floxin-damage-is-a-topologic-issue-folks.22122/post-251518>

How do topologic insulators like DNA and drugs which contain Fluoride ruin one another? Fluoride as a dielectric blocker cause topologic breakdown of the enzymes in humans to cause Floxin damage. This paper totally explains why certain antibiotics need to be avoided in people with poor redox and high heteroplasmy rate. It also means if you are a "floxxie" by definition your mitochondrial DNA is trashed and you better become a Black Swan to learn how to deal with it. Topoisomerases are enzymes in humans that participate in the overwinding or underwinding of DNA. Humans have more supercoils in their DNA than any other species on Earth and this is why we have the most complex epigenetic programs to run them smoothly. All are tightly controlled by the electromagnetic spectrum of the environment our mitochondrial colony senses.

DNA topology was built for the Alkali metals and their reactivity. If you look at a periodic table you'll be shocked to see hydrogen, a gas, sitting atop this group of metals. Hydrogen is a nonmetal and is placed above group in the periodic table because it has ns1 electron configuration like the alkali metals. When hydrogen loses its electron is becomes a super alkali metal and this is why DNA and RNA topology uses it to control our epigenetic toolbox on phosphate, sugar and base moieties in our nucleic acids. Modern biology still has not woken up to this reality.

The winding problem of DNA/RNA arises due to the intertwined nature of its double-helical structure. This makes it the ideal antenna for electromagnetic radiations but it causes topology problems for the epigenetic toolbox to read them. During DNA replication and transcription, DNA becomes overwound ahead of a replication fork. If left unabated, this torsion would eventually stop the ability of DNA or RNA polymerases involved in these processes to continue down the DNA strand. This is essentially what fluoride does to DNA and RNA in humans. It blocks the electric and magnetic reading of these chemicals.

In order to prevent and correct these types of topological problems caused by the double helix, topoisomerases bind to DNA and cut the phosphate backbone of either one or both the DNA strands. This intermediate break allows the DNA to be untangled or unwound, and, at the end of these processes, the DNA backbone is resealed again. Since the overall chemical composition and connectivity of the DNA do not change, the DNA substrate and product are chemical isomers, differing only in their global topology, resulting in the name for these enzymes. I have taught my Black Swans about topology now for 5 years and I made sure they knew that the Nobel Prize was given two Octobers ago in physics for topology. Topoisomerases are isomerase enzymes that act on the topology of DNA. [https://academic.oup.com/nar/advance-article/doi/10.1093/nar/gky793/5088042](https://academic.oup.com/nar/advance-article/doi/10.1093/nar/gky793/5088042)

# Thread: Hardly a need for glasses anymore!
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hardly-a-need-for-glasses-anymore.22123/>
**Subforum:** Success Stories
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Erin Gaiser — 2018-09-22T17:51:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hardly-a-need-for-glasses-anymore.22123/post-251533>

I ditched my glasses and contacts altogether in May 2018 (except for driving). We were out in the sun as much as possible this summer. We stopped using artificial light during the day and evening somewhere during the summer when I started reading about all that stuff. At some point maybe August we started using blue blockers at night. Right now it is the end of September and I did another test at the optometrist: before -2.75 and now just -.75 and -1.25! I am back to the same eye sight of when I got my first glasses!

### caroline — 2018-09-24T09:31:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hardly-a-need-for-glasses-anymore.22123/post-251609>

nice success Erin. My partner has sustantiably lower pressure in both eyes when tested this morning - so all the morning sun etc is paying off.

### Dani — 2018-09-24T20:21:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hardly-a-need-for-glasses-anymore.22123/post-251629>

That's fantastic, Erin! And the optometrist always says, "Oh, you're just getting older. There's nothing that can be done." I bet the doc was pretty impressed by your improvement. Were you asked about what you did and if so, how did the doc take your response?

### ElectricUniverse — 2018-09-25T18:13:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hardly-a-need-for-glasses-anymore.22123/post-251671>

I've been myopic since childhood. I dislike corrective lenses (they are only a crutch and some in the field believe they do indeed weaken the eyes causing progressive myopia).

One thing I notice as I advance in years is improvement in my far vision. I can now go without glasses and still have far vision acute enough for tasks like driving. However, my once formidable near vision has diminished somewhat-- presumably presbyopia, attributable to aging of eye parts).

It is my understanding that it is actually common for many myopic people to have an improvement in far vision as they age, but also diminishing of near vision.

Myopia seems to be an acquired functional dysfunction in most cases, due to our modern misuse of eyes (used to be caused by book reading in childhood education, now also blue screen detail reading).

There are many alternative schools of thought that buck the conventional wisdom that only corrective lenses will help the problem--- probably the foremost practitioner of a natural approach to getting rid of glasses was _Dr Bates_ (who by the way was far ahead of his time for recommending what he called **sunning** the eyes to improve vision).

Dr Kruse would be proud.

1.  E = Epi-Paleo Rx method of eating. The food you eat should be as low in inflammation as possible based upon HS CRP, mTOR, Vitamin D, and your CoEnQ10 levels.
2.  P= top quartile progesterone levels on your hormone panel. For men this one is relatively simple if you order the test. For ladies it requires the balance of Progesterone to Estradiol to be in decent balance to get optimal gut function.
3.  C= Cortisol optimization and the potential use of cycloset. The cortisol status can best be checked using an 4 panel salivary adrenal stress index (ASI) that includes a DHEA level.
4.  O = Onions/Garlic/Oxytocin The onions and garlic have huge local effects on endogenous gut health
5.  Tx = Tumeric, Metformin, DHEA, melatonin. The remainder of the protocol incorporates a variety of these substances if they are needed based upon ones history or lab findings.

Hi all, I have been "stalking" this site for about 1 1/2 years, but because of my background as an optometrist and nutritionist from Toronto (I know, don't judge me :O ), I was wary about what Dr Jack was saying. After being at first completely shocked, disbelieving and overwhelmed, I started doing my own research, and slowly, slowly began to see the brilliance of this man. I am still learning and I am embarrassed to say that I have to read most things more than a few times and there are still so many things I don't fully understand.

I am happy to have found my tribe, because being an up and coming mitochondriac is a lonely thing. Happily, my husband, even though he is a big skeptic, supports me 100, or maybe 80%!.

If there are any other black swan mitochondriacs in Israel, or Toronto, I'd love to hear from you.

Have a sunny day everyone!

Let's not even talk about their financial motivation in all of this.

I need to be responsible for me ....and do whatever it takes - and Jack has given me the tools to do exactly just that.

I am so lucky to have a partner that is fully on board and willing to do whatever it takes. He just came back from the eye Doc and the pressure is much better in his eyes - so he is really stoked.

This study below, on the surface, is a bad news for mice because it does not apply to humans.......**UNTIL** you realize that ignorant researchers will use lab mice in a blue-lit lab to run food experiments.......then you'll realize just how this type of study is weaponized by Big Food, Big Pharma, and Monsanto to help sculpt the Dietary guidelines of governments.

Too bad the simple-minded food gurus never figure out this blueprint and just harp on how bad the guidelines are. That is an incredible waste of time and resources when trying to change a paradigm. It does show that nocturnal mammals, with their STRONG covalent bond between melanopsin and retinol, are still harmed by unopposed blue light HEV because no red or purple light is the antidotes. That was some of the key points of Vermont 2018.

Diurnal mammals like humans have a WEAK covalent bond making them more sensitive to blue light HEV damage. So for the Black Swans out there-there is a buried lesson here. How many will realize it? There is a biohack one can do to show the ignorant just how incredibly important filtering light is via the eye or skin in diurnal mammals. What is it the hack? Pick the right season, the right animals with certain surface markings, and add one contact to their eyes that block certain parts of the visual field. You must know where melanopsin is located topographically on their retina to see the full effect. What might you find if you do this? You might unlock the key why human melanopsin dysfunction is causing all our chronic diseases. In addition, when you do this hack in a young and old animal you will see different results. This is how "a smart Black Swan' can find out your heteroplasmy rate in your retina and brain. Hacking contacts, sunglasses, and glasses is something a Black Swan does and rarely talks about.

Black Swans in training will learn that young hackers patient who wears one lens in one side of the visual system (eye) that blocks UV while the other does not. The wise will notice that the opposite side of the young animal's body will tan right down the midline. This demarcation is so striking that you'll begin to realize why shingles infections happen as they do in the very same way. Black Swans rarely miss any chance to learn nuance in their hacks. Knowing which young animals to pick, what their surface markings and hair color are are key until understanding the mitochondrial dynamics at play. During the hack, you'll notice surface color changes also vary in the animals. This is how a Black Swan learns how to treat and handle melasma in ignorant diurnal mammals who refuse to understand the power of light. Why do these observations matter to the Black Swan? In the human visual system, the left eye goes to send visual sensory inputs to the left side of the brain which controls the right half of the body which explains the changes in alpha MSH of the mammal. The brain has the skin's topology wired into it so each hemisphere senses the opposite of the body so peripheral light on the skin and eye can affect the entire surface to make the connection f the sun to every mitochondrion in you have a higher fidelity. # Thread: Kris's Optimal Journal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/kriss-optimal-journal.22135/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 31
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Kris Kolo — 2018-09-24T21:06:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/kriss-optimal-journal.22135/post-251633>

So happy to be here!!!

I am going to post today HERE what I meant to post about 1 month ago (late Aug) when I was about 2 months into sunning and only 1-2 weeks into trying to mitigate blue light, do Sphinx etc etc.

Late August first post:

Hello! I'm 56 years old, chronic pain started 9 years ago in 2009; gets worse with each passing month or quarter. Super low hormones (all of them incl Vitamin D if I didn't supplement); immune markers way off (haven't had my annual cold, flu, or fever since 2004). Low thyroid since 2004. Pain set in about the time of menopause - and the end of a 9-year divorce from hell. I'm betting both issues contributed to start of pain.

Type of pain: Joint pain - but much worse is the pain from pressures of other surfaces (floor, chair, bed) against surface of body parts pressed against them. Chairs, beds, and the floor are all my enemies now - I can't hold any position for long because tissues under pressure start screaming too loudly after 30-60 minutes.

I've suspected tissue hypoxia for years due to effect of pressure against body parts (compresses already poor microcirculation?). Walking or gentle movement helps most of me probably due to circulation effects, except it makes surfaces of feet much worse. Annual Venous oxygen tests in 2012-2013-2014 went from 26 (borderline) to 36 (bad) to 52 (very bad).

For first 8 years, heat of hottub or shower was the only thing that helped pain, perhaps because heat expands circulation temporarily. Now feet hurt too much in a bath or hottub - toes ache like they're being strangled - low oxygen - similar to pain when you come in from the snow and were super cold and start thawing out with boots off - that ache that might be "reperfusion" injury?

Did venous oxygen tests in 2013, 14, and 15 - showed tissues were picking up less and less oxygen from tissues. Why don't doctors know ANYTHING about that test, which feels very important to me? To be expected - they're so behind.

Sleep down to 1-2 hours at a time due primarily to pain building up in shoulder or hip pressed against bed. Diagnosed with fibromyalgia, but not much trust in that label. Have generally eaten low grain/ carb and avoided processed or non organic food for years. Scandinavian/ northern european descent.

I discovered Jack Kruse's amazing work AFTER I discovered in May that sitting in sun here in Boston actually took away 80% of my pain WHILE I was in sun (effect doesn't continue once I am inside, sadly). I knew my Vit D was low if not on supplements - so decided to commit to 30 min in midday sun each day.

Miraculously, after 6 weeks of this sunning - I felt my HORMONES coming back!!! Membrane surfaces of body started to get moist again - eyes, mouth etc. So I looked online to see if anyone believes the sun causes increases in other hormones besides Vit D - and WOW - found Jack's writings.

Excited to learn!! Have started in last two weeks to tighten diet (seafood, no snacking, eat 30 min after waking etc) and do the Sphinx and have ordered glasses etc. Most critically, I just booked 5 months in Florida this winter. I'm determined to get the right quantum energy and swim in the ocean daily, something I've never done but which might help.

-   I started earthing PROPERLY about 1 week ago and it has been AMAZING in its impact at night. Since starting grounding sheet...that is down to 2-3 x / night!!!!!!) First real improvement in sleep since all this set in about 9 years ago.

-   THANKS!!!

### Kris Kolo — 2018-11-07T03:11:23+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/kriss-optimal-journal.22135/post-255144>

Posting some additional background on me as well as Yukatan updates!!! Am feeling a little guilty about not posting much about myself yet in this online journal. I joined in early Sept-ish this year. Then again - my excuse is reasonable, LOL. I was prioritizing turning my life, family, and work upside down to start moving much of my life from the Boston area to the Yukatan, where I am now.

UPDATE:

I spent a week in Playa del Carmen in October as a first toe in Yukatan water. I didn't like it much - I am not a "city" girl and it felt much more urban than I expected. It also didn't feel as safe as I'd hoped as a single gal. Were about 8 locks and gates and barbed wire around courtyard of my Airbnb. My readings at this Airbnb on my Coronet and Trifeld were fairly high. As were my readings "about town" as I walked the streets. So I cancelled my plans for a winter in PDC and started looking for a new town to settle in down here.

At just the right moment, in walked a new friend to my life here with a GREAT "where to live" idea (an american who's been here 30 years whom I met while at my new integrative MD in PDC - highly recommend this doc...he has other patients following Kruse and living down here and he has great respect for Dr Kruse/ those patients' results).

This woman showed me HER town of Puerto Aventuras. 20 min drive from PDC toward Tulum. I came and did some meter readings...they seemed good...so I booked three weeks at an Airbnb here. I'm half way thru that stretch right now and LOVE it here!! It is only 5000 people (less population density than PDC)...more like a resort village with a really lively town center on the harbor. So many interesting and nice people from around the world who are easy to meet/ talk to.

My readings on meter are pretty low - and I'm feeling much better here than in PDC. And much safer - it is a gated community with LOTS of security. But it is not as "boring" and homogenous a gated community as say Playacar in PDC...which from photos looks a bit like the moon to me. This town has great restaurants and shops on the harborfront for an easy social life outside. Beaches are amazing - very little seaweed compared to PDC beaches and also some good areas with "low waves" (my arms are in too much pain to flap about much in bigger waves)

So now I am working to find a place to rent here for first 5 or 6 months of 2019.

I will add something I noticed my first two weeks in Mexico here. I felt AWFUL!! I think I was detoxing...just from the magnetic fields!!! I felt a little nausea and headachy...those are two things NOT in my typical symptom list. Also my pain (my big issue) was much more intense than usual. WHen I went back to boston area for one week in the middle of my first 4 weeks in Mexico - it confirmed my suspicion. I immediately felt better (best I've felt in 2-3 years!)...for the first two days home at least. I think detox came to grinding halt. Usually my symptoms don't change much day to day. Then after first 3 glorious feeling days I started to go downhill again.

Now I am on day 16 in Mexico...and I finally feel the detox is slowing. I was in sun for 6 hours today and it felt glorious...the direct / strong sun REALLY helps my pain (at least while I'm in it!)

MATERNAL / Family HEALTH BACKGROUND:

I know mothers' health (and maternal health history) matters to Dr Kruse so will mention here. My maternal grandmother was off the boat swedish - and she lived to 92, eating lots of butter and seafood. No bad neuro issues in end - just lots of arthritis. She stayed blonde til the end, naturally! She had had scarlet fever as a young woman in her late 20's and was in hospital for that ...but pulled thru. Otherwise unremarkable health history. She DID have a brother with parkinsons who I barefly remember ever meeting.

My mother's health is hard to ID because she was in a bad car accident at age 26 and almost died...had some brain damage and much physical damage that plagued her for rest of her life...she's still alive though at 75 - but is an invalid in high care nursing due to physical and mental limitations. BUT she had me when she was a very healthy 18 year old. It must have been a stressful first trimester though because she got pregnant with my dad BEFORE having a quick marriage 3 mo into pregnancy..and both she and my dad were from very conservative families. (they are still together almost 60 years later, having met at age 12 and survived a horrible car crash at the end of my dad's 8 years getting a PhD in chemistry.

Aside from my mother's injuries and long term damage from car accident - she's had no health issues...only maybe low thyroid. No cancer, no heart issues...she was in fabulous shape when young and had great internal strength to do the 3-4 years of physical therapy needed to relearn how to walk, talk, write, and drive...all while being a mom to me (age 8-12) and my much younger brother.

Nowhere in my family have I seen cancer or diabetes. Or mental illness. All 4 grandparents lived into their 90s. I had 47 years that felt INCREDIBLY healthy...before numbness and pain started to set in in 2009 at end of a 9 year divorce from hell (first husband, bad choice). The pain has gotten much worse with each passing quarter and month since then. I can't walk without huge foot pain. I can't sleep more than an hour before excruciating shoulder and hip pain wake me (and can't lie awake on one side for more than 10 min before I must carefully roll over to relieve the increasing pain on whatever side I'm lying on). Sitting i have a huge burning in buttocks that gets worse and worse the longer i sit. It even hurts now to put my cheeks on the pillow at night. But never any fatigue or much brain fog (or no one has heart to tell me my brain is cooked LOL!!)

BTW my 23andme shows my background is mix of scandinavian and celtic...solidly northern european. I am naturally the whitest person I know...aside from my dad and daughter. BUT i managed to avoid sunburns all summer sunning in boston and even here in Mexico over two weeks I've been here. Started Sphinx in early Sept this year...did it except for a week in early Oct when sitting in kiniki bikini in front of a propane heater...turned into just walking the dog at sunrise due to temps. Cold makes my pain MUCH worse. Attempts at cold baths so far have been disastrous...I end up in much worse pain for a day or two...so bad that I can't sleep at all. I do face dunking in ice water or chest ice ok. Hoping as I build redox down here in sunny mexico that will change so I can do CT more easily!!!

PAIN RELIEF HISTORY

As for pain relief...over the first 8 years of my 9 years of pain...heat of a bath or hottub or sauna helped my pain a lot - but never for more than an hour post exposure to hot water. i always felt my pain was due to poor microcirculation/ oxygenation...as it gets worse fast with any pressure. about 10 yr back my skin got very "impressionable"...as if blood flow and pressure had gotten bad. My venous oxygen tests in 2013-2015 got worse and worse...from 25 (borderline) to 39 (bad) to 54 (very bad) meaning tissues NOT picking up oxygen from blood...so much of my blood just circled back to heart with too much remaining oxygen.

No pain killers do much so I try to avoid them...except for maybe 1-2 tramadol pills a month for special occasions (like a long flight or an occasion like a wedding where I want to feel slightly better). A tramadol only takes away 30 percent of my pain for 24 hours. A glass of wine takes away 40% of my pain for same 24 hours oddly, though I am NOT doing any now because it is just not good to drink when in health state I'm in. (By comparison - sitting in hot sun takes away 80 percent of my pain WHILE i'm in sun...which could only be a couple hours a day in Boston suburbs this past summer)

I know most people get let to the SUN by Dr. Kruse. In MY case...the sun actually led me to Dr Kruse!!! After noticing the sun's effect on my pain this summer, I scratched head and googled "sun" and "pain" and "hormones" (i could feel my tissues getting less dry by the weeek when sunning!)...guess who popped up...Dr Kruse!

More later!
